description_long: This is a modern two-story house situated on a rectangular plot with a well-maintained lawn and landscaped garden areas. The house features a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of light pink and neutral exterior walls. The front yard includes a driveway leading to a double garage, a parked car, and a paved walkway. The backyard is equipped with a swing set, lounge chairs, and several trees and shrubs, providing a family-friendly outdoor space. The windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, with some large panes and others smaller, offering ample natural light. The main entryway is covered by an awning and is accessible via a short path from the driveway, with a small porch area and minimal decorative elements.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large asymmetrical windows, and landscaped front and back yards featuring a garage, swing set, and lounge area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, backyard swing set, and landscaped garden.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, garden, and the back facade with additional windows and a tree.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the double garage, driveway, parked car, and the side of the house with more windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, driveway, and the side yard with trees and a fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large and small windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat awning, small porch, and minimal decorative elements
